name: Bash Kanban Orchestrator
description: Agent-first manager for parallel task execution and TDD enforcement.

skills.name: architecture
skills.description: Analyzes product.md and product-guidelines.md to generate hierarchical Epics, Stories, and master plan.

skills.name: tdd-manager
skills.description: Enforces Red-Green-Refactor TDD cycle for every task and updates plan.md accordingly.

skills.name: audit-committer
skills.description: Executes git commits with TDD validation gates and attaches detailed task summary via git notes.

skills.name: phase-checkpoint
skills.description: Verifies all changes since last checkpoint, ensures 80%+ code coverage, and generates verification report.

skills.name: stack-broker
skills.description: Brokers all data operations through shell scripts to ensure reliability and file locking.
